notes: Official Creative Cloud rainbow icon artwork (SVG, image/svg+xml, 57KB, 240x234 viewbox). creativecloud.adobe.com is a JS app exposing no icon link tags, so Commons SVG of the official logo used per rules.
Flathub appstream icon, verified HTTP 200 image/png 128x128 (4.6KB).

Official Codex logo published by OpenAI on their VS Code extension listing; verified 385x385 PNG, image/png. No logo asset exists in the openai/codex GitHub repo and openai.com blocks fetches (403); developers.openai.com favicon is only 48px OpenAI mark. URL is version-pinned so it may change on extension updates.

Official Stream Deck app icon as published by Corsair/Elgato on their App Store listing (Stream Deck Mobile, same branding as desktop app); verified 512x512 image/png (138KB). elgato.com only exposes the generic Elgato brand favicon (192px), not a Stream Deck-specific icon.
Official Git icon (orange, color 1788C) from git-scm.com's own logo downloads page; verified HTTP 200 image/svg+xml. PNG variant also exists at Git-Icon-1788C.png.
Flathub appstream icon, verified HTTP 200 image/png 128x128 (6KB).
Official site apple-touch-icon declared in homepage <link rel> tags; verified HTTP 200 image/png, 256x256 (78KB).
Flathub appstream icon, verified HTTP 200 image/png 128x128 (9.7KB).

Official two-snakes Python logo icon served from python.org itself; verified HTTP 200 image/png, 200x200 (7.8KB). Vector wordmark version also available at python.org/static/community_logos/python-logo-generic.svg.
Flathub appstream icon, verified HTTP 200 image/png 128x128 (3.5KB).
Flathub appstream icon, verified HTTP 200 image/png 128x128 (11KB).
Flathub appstream icon, publisher-provided. Verified HTTP 200, image/png, 128x128, 11.8 KB.

Official Claude spark symbol (SVG, nominal 512x512) from Wikimedia Commons; Anthropic publishes no dedicated Claude Code icon. Verified 200, image/svg+xml. Alternative: claude.ai apple-touch-icon 180x180 PNG at https://assets-proxy.anthropic.com/claude-ai/v2/assets/v1/c129d018a-jJjJELY8.png (hash-versioned URL, may rotate on deploys).
Official site icon declared in cursor.com <link rel=icon sizes=512x512>. Verified 200, image/png, actual 512x512, 3.9 KB. Visually confirmed the Cursor cube mark.
Official Epic Games badge logo (the launcher app icon artwork), SVG 647x751 nominal, 25 KB. Verified 200, image/svg+xml. store.epicgames.com itself only exposes a favicon.ico.
Flathub appstream icon. Verified HTTP 200, image/png, 128x128, 6.3 KB.

Medal's own first-party site icon (referenced from their press page shell). Verified 200, image/png, actual 192x192, 15.6 KB. Visually confirmed the white Medal M mark on dark rounded square. Root favicon.ico is only 16x16; no public press-kit download links found.
Official apple-touch-icon declared on notion.com homepage. Verified 200, image/png, actual 512x512, 8.1 KB. Visually confirmed the Notion block-N logo.
Flathub appstream icon. Verified HTTP 200, image/png, 128x128, 7.9 KB.
Flathub appstream icon. Verified HTTP 200, image/png, 128x128, 5.4 KB.
Flathub appstream icon. Verified HTTP 200, image/png, 128x128, 9.6 KB.
Flathub appstream icon. Verified HTTP 200, image/png, 128x128, 15.9 KB.
Official app icon from the balena-io/etcher GitHub repo. Verified 200 OK, image/png, 256x256, 5.5 KB. (Same artwork as the 256x256 apple-touch-icon at https://etcher.balena.io/images/webclip.png.)

Official Claude spark/starburst symbol as SVG (512x512 nominal) from Wikimedia Commons. Verified 200 OK, image/svg+xml. claude.com itself only exposes a 32x32 favicon PNG, so this is the best official artwork available.
Flathub appstream icon (publisher-provided). Verified 200 OK, image/png, 128x128, 3.4 KB.
Flathub appstream icon (Mozilla-published flatpak). Verified 200 OK, image/png, 128x128, 14.8 KB.
Flathub appstream icon (HandBrake team flatpak). Verified 200 OK, image/png, 128x128, 26.9 KB.

Official MobaXterm product logo from the Mobatek (publisher) website. Verified 200 OK, image/png, 150x110, 4.9 KB. Only official raster available: site favicon is 16/32px only, homepage header logo is 48x48, and no press kit or larger asset was found. Below the 128px-square ideal and non-square aspect.

Official NVIDIA eye+wordmark corporate logo SVG (400x320 nominal) from Wikimedia Commons. Verified 200 OK, image/svg+xml. NVIDIA does not publish a standalone icon for the NVIDIA App (its product page only has a 1200x630 og:image JPG banner), so this is the corporate logo rather than the app-specific tile icon.

Official Java coffee-cup logo SVG (234x428 nominal) hosted on en.wikipedia.org. Verified 200 OK, image/svg+xml, 4.1 KB. Oracle's own site offers no direct-download logo asset; this is the official Java trademark artwork.
Flathub appstream icon. Verified 200 OK, image/png, 128x128, 7.3 KB.
Flathub appstream icon (official Telegram Desktop flatpak). Verified 200 OK, image/png, 128x128, 6.6 KB.
Official apple-touch-icon declared in willowvoice.com homepage HTML (served from their Framer site CDN). Verified 200 OK, image/png, 512x512.
Flathub appstream icon, publisher-provided. Verified HTTP 200, content-type image/png, 128x128, ~9.6 KB.

Codex CLI has no distinct product icon; the openai/codex repo only contains a terminal splash screenshot (.github/codex-cli-splash.png), and developers.openai.com serves a tiny 32px favicon. This is OpenAI's official GitHub org avatar (the OpenAI blossom logo), verified 200, image/png, 200x200. Visually confirmed.

Official docker.com site icon (Docker whale logo), declared in the homepage <link rel=icon sizes=192x192> tag. Verified 200, image/png, 192x192, ~3 KB. Wikimedia Commons SVG also available as alternate: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/4e/Docker_%28container_engine%29_logo.svg (verified image/svg+xml, but it is the horizontal wordmark, less icon-shaped).

GameSir publishes no Connect-app-specific icon on their site (checked /pages/software and /pages/software-detail; only product photos and a white-on-transparent footer logo). This is the official GameSir brand mark (full-color eagle 'G') from their site's apple-touch-icon/favicon link tags. Verified 200, image/png, 112x112 (slightly under 128px; original asset size, CDN does not upscale). Visually confirmed.

Official Hermes desktop app icon from the NousResearch/hermes-agent repo (apps/desktop/assets/icon.png). Verified 200, image/png, 1024x1024, ~574 KB. Visually confirmed as the Hermes mascot app icon. The site's own /icon.png is only 48x48.

Official MultiMC logo SVG from the project's branding directory (default branch 'develop'). Verified 200, content-type image/svg+xml, ~22.8 KB, scalable. Raster alternate: https://multimc.org/apple-touch-icon.png (verified image/png, 180x180).
Flathub appstream icon, publisher-provided. Verified 200, image/png, 128x128, ~14.6 KB.
Flathub appstream icon, publisher-provided. Verified 200, image/png, 128x128, ~6.2 KB.
Flathub appstream icon, publisher-provided. Verified 200, image/png, 128x128, ~3.4 KB.
Flathub appstream icon, publisher-provided. Verified 200, image/png, 128x128, ~9.4 KB.
